About

The person behind the data

I'm a data and operations professional who has worked at the intersection of large-scale field operations, supply chain logistics, and political analytics. My career has been defined by one thing: building systems that work for people operating in the field — not just for analysts sitting in offices.

At I-PAC, I ran data operations for campaigns that touched every corner of Bihar — tracking beneficiary outreach for 3 crore families, mapping 50,000 villages, and managing ground teams of 100+ field personnel. At Crystal Cold Chain, I built the full suite of internal tools from scratch — a Yard Command Center, Finance Portal, and Service Complaint system used daily by technicians, managers, and accounts teams.

My approach is end-to-end: I design the data architecture, build the pipeline, create the dashboard, and train the people using it. Operations intelligence isn't just about the data — it's about making the data move the right people to do the right things.

Projects

What I've built

Political Operations · Bihar · I-PAC + JOGGF

State-Scale Political Data Operations

I-PAC + JOGGF · 2022–2025

Bihar's political campaigns needed real-time visibility across millions of beneficiaries, thousands of field agents, and 38 districts simultaneously — with zero tolerance for data gaps or duplication.

PLC Campaign

3 crore household data drive — largest by any political party in Indian history. AWS RDS backend, live Power BI dashboards updating hourly, fraud detection, 30+ KPI matrices.

Youth Club Network

3 clubs × 50,000 villages × 38 districts. Supply chain data for 1.25L collateral deliveries. QGIS maps, Apps Script pipelines, Looker Studio dashboards.

Vistaar Sabha

100-day campaign analytics for Bihar Badlav Yatra. Phase-wise meeting trends, Looker Studio reporting pipeline, real-time visibility for leadership.

Campaigns Managed — Full Data · Monitoring · Evaluation · Reporting

Har Ghar Jan Suraaj · 2023

Har Ghar Jan Suraaj

Door-to-door political outreach campaign. Built end-to-end data collection pipeline using Zoho Forms — intake, monitoring, evaluation and real-time reporting dashboards for leadership across all 38 districts of Bihar.

Cultural Identity Campaign

Bihari Asmita

Campaign to celebrate Bihar's local festivals and cultural heroes. Managed complete data operations — participation tracking, event monitoring, district-wise reporting and impact evaluation across the state.

Youth Sports Engagement

Khelega Bihar

Block → District → State level sports competition to engage Bihar's youth. Handled full data pipeline — participant registration, competition monitoring, results tracking, and performance reporting for leadership review.

Education Outreach Campaign

Padhega Bihar

Campaign to onboard village teachers and facilitate resources to start teaching in their communities. Managed teacher registration, onboarding data, supply tracking, monitoring of facilitation activities and impact reporting.

Analytical Methods

The arsenal

A/B Testing

Controlled experiments to validate campaign strategies and feature decisions

→ Political campaign optimization

Z-Score / T-Test

Statistical significance testing for hypothesis validation at scale

→ Voter data significance testing

KPI Dashboards

Real-time operational metrics driving field decisions at district level

→ Power BI · Looker Studio · Chart.js

ARIMA / SARIMA

Time series forecasting for demand and operational planning

→ Supply chain forecasting

Cohort Analysis

Tracking group behaviour over time to identify operational patterns

→ Beneficiary tracking pipelines

Funnel Analysis

Drop-off identification across multi-step operational workflows

→ Campaign conversion tracking

Fraud Detection

Anomaly flagging in distribution data at crore-record scale

→ PLC Campaign · Bihar

ETL Pipelines

End-to-end data ingestion, cleaning, validation, and loading

→ AWS RDS · SurveyCTO · Apps Script

Geospatial / QGIS

Block and AC-level mapping for field deployment and coverage

→ 50,000 villages · 9,000 panchayats

Variance Analysis

Decomposing operational variances into volume, price, and mix effects

→ Supply chain analytics

Regression

Identifying drivers of operational outcomes across field variables

→ Lead time prediction

Root Cause Analysis

Systematic diagnosis of operational failures and performance drops

→ Supply chain disruption analysis

Interests

What drives me

🗳️

Political Economy

How data shapes democratic outcomes. Tracking how policy reaches the last mile — from Bihar's 38 districts to individual households.

🌐

India at Scale

Fascinated by India-scale problem solving — governance, logistics, and public systems that serve a billion people across languages and geographies.

🤖

Generative AI in Ops

Building Gen AI tools that solve real operational problems — not demos, but daily-use systems deployed inside companies.

📦

Supply Chain Systems

Cold chain, logistics, and invisible infrastructure. The systems that keep things moving when no one's watching.

📊

Behavioural Economics

IIT Bombay M.A. Economics grounding — applying behavioural insights to design systems that field workers actually use.

🏗️

Building for Bharat

StarCampaign is the start. Tools that are accessible, local-language-friendly, and designed for low-literacy contexts.
